ingredients: ⅛ cup grated") cucumber (about 1 inch of cucumber)
1–2 tbsp finely chopped or minced onions (optional)
procedure: Squeeze the grated cucumber to remove and discard excess liquid.
Stir the cucumber into the yogurt.
Add chopped mint, cilantro, and onion.
Sprinkle a little ground cumin on top.
Sprinkle with chili powder if desired.
